calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-23-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Amy Shelf appeared via zoom for Maxwell Singer (petitioner).

This matter was put on for hearing with appearance required for the purpose of admitting copy of the lost will. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate admitting copy of the lost will.. The copy of the lost will dated April 4, 2008 is admitted to probate.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.
